name: zwo
description: Install ZWO camera drivers, ASI Studio, and ASCOM driver.
verify: powershell.exe -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -NoProfile -NonInteractive -Command "$log = Join-Path $env:ProgramData 'MAST\logs\zwo-verify.log'; $driver = 'C:\Program Files\ZWO'; if (Test-Path $driver) { Set-Content -Path $log -Value 'ZWO driver installed'; Set-Content -Path (Join-Path $env:ProgramData 'MAST\logs\zwo-smoke.txt') -Value 'zwo_ok' } else { 'ZWO driver path not found' | Out-File $log; exit 1 }"
